name: Six Legends
short_description: The epic and emotional journey of six dragons growing up in a broken civilization, each with their own unique perspectives on life. Mixing Visual Novel, Point-And-Click, Rhythm, Cooking, Fighting and more, Six Legends is a unique experience about life and friends.
detailed_description:
Narrative Point & Click, and more

Six Legends is a narrative game with a unique blend of Point & Click, 3D Visual Novel, Rhythm, Fighting, Cooking gameplay... and more!

The pacy and character-centric narration define Six Legends' storytelling, ensuring an experience both charming, touching and fun, that constantly renews itself.

Become part of the game's world, get attached to the characters, and discover what friendship means among dragons.

Six Dragons, Six Stories

These six dragons have never known anything else than their broken civilization. As life is at its bleakest, they each embark on their own individual journeys to discover there's so much more to the world, and themselves...

But this self-growth comes with an inescapable web of lies, that their friendship might not survive.

Make your own opinion

Try the demo, see for yourself! The save files are compatible.

Features

  • Light, pleasant writing that lets the hours fly by

  • +10 hours of gripping, emotional story

  • Compelling and lovable characters

  • Laughs, tears, but most of all, joy and love

  • Losing keeps the story going

  • Explore a light fantasy world and its civilizations

  • Guide each of the six different dragons

  • Friendship, Love, War and Hate

  • Twitch integration : Play with an audience

Difficult beginnings

Conflict, famine, and extinction threaten dragonkind. Hunted and reclusive, Thak's Flight is no exception. Their fate seems sealed as only six dragons make up the last generation, including his own son.

It's in this context that the six young adults have had their growth and learning experience. Tasked almost daily with hunting for food, did they ever get the time to really grow up?

There is more to this world, and the fate of their kind may not depend on them alone.

All's that missing is you
